name: Pat Harrigan
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $126,511 for Pat Harrigan in U.S. House, NC-10. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
